item.title: Adorable AND creepy?
item.content:encoded: You certainly know how to combine the two creatively: one minute I was awww-ing over SCP-3297's doting-grandma act, and the next minute I was shuddering at how her memory-eating was ruining the test subject's life. (Even D-class people are human beings with rights!) Upvoted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Catholic holidays

Nice. This is a solidly written article as is, but I wouldn't have enjoyed it nearly as much if your giant cicada wasn't connected to the other well-known cicada SCPs on the site. +1

item.title: It hurts
item.content:encoded: It's painful, not knowing whether she's actually sad about the subject not coming back and actually cares about her "grandchildren," or if she's faking it to get more memories to eat. I want to feel sorry for her, but I also know that it might all be an act by an uncaring predator that knows no remorse. And of course, for the sake of safety, the Foundation has to assume the latter.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My first post.

I'd like to thank the kind folks in the forums and the IRC chat who helped me the last few months.

E: I have not checked on this since last night and I'm humbled by the reception this has gotten. Thank you so much for reading.
